concerns.text: Tasks T045-T053 (Phases 8 & 9) implement features (Lorentz transformations, Alfvén speed modeling, non-linear saturation fitting) that are explicitly removed from scope in the 'Removed Scope Creep' note and contradict Spec FR-005/FR-013 which limit statistical rigor to permutation tests and linear correlation. These tasks have no valid FR/SC anchor in the current spec.

Tasks T046 and T047 require implementing Lorentz transformations to convert Ey from the spacecraft frame to the plasma rest frame. This contradicts Spec Assumptions which state the system ingests a 'pre-computed' Ey without derivation. There is no FR/SC in the spec authorizing this transformation logic.

Tasks T049 and T050 require implementing a variable distance model and Alfvén speed estimation. The Spec (FR-012, Assumptions) explicitly fixes the distance at 60 Re as a heuristic and does not include requirements for variable distance modeling or Alfvén speed validation. These tasks lack FR/SC anchors.

Task T053 requires fitting a non-linear model (logistic/power-law) to test for saturation. Spec FR-007 and FR-008 only mandate a linear correlation sweep and scatter plot. The Spec does not contain an FR/SC requiring non-linear model fitting or saturation analysis.

Task T001 creates a directory tree that includes `code/config.py` in the `tree` block but the `mkdir` command does not create the file itself (only the directory). While the `touch` commands follow, the task description implies the `mkdir` creates the file structure including the file, which is technically inaccurate. Minor clarification needed.
